name: Gujarati Mango Curry (Pukki Keri Nu Shak)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add mustard seeds and cumin seeds. Allow them to splutter.
3. Add onion, green chilies, and ginger. Sauté until onions turn translucent.
4. Stir in turmeric powder, chili powder, and salt.
5. Add mango pieces and tomatoes. Cook for 5 minutes or until the tomatoes soften.
6. Pour yogurt over the curry and mix well.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes until the mangoes are tender and the flavors meld together.
8. Turn off the heat and serve hot with rice or roti.
